title: Admin Tools
description: Adds Tools only able to be used by an Administrator.
body:
Warnings:
Please do not try to get the advancement BANNED because it is meant for banned players and when you go to banlands all your advancements go away.

When Banned you lose all Items.

 

This Mod Adds
 

 

Admin Sword (Insta Kills and when RMB is clicked it summons lightning)

Admin Pickaxe (Insta Breaks and when RMB is clicked it destroys any block)

Admin Liquid (Kills any person that comes in contact with the liquid)

Admin Gun (It shoots very fast and insta kills anyone)

Admin Food (Is Inf Food For Admins)

 

Also
 

Admin Profession Block (Adds a Profession that you can use tokens to trade with to get admin items)

Admin Trading Tokens (Used for Admin Profession)

 

Adds a new command called /banlandban and it is like this:

/banlandban <player>

It sends a person to the Ban Land that is a custom dimension with ALOT of creatures so beware if your ban land banned.

to undo do:

/unbanlandban <player>

 

Anyone is allowed to use this mod in a modpack.

Also this mod is on Curseforge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/administrator-tools
